name.ja: <ruby>鬼神<rt>アシュトラーヤ</rt></ruby> <ruby>水子守命<rt>ミクマリノミコト</rt></ruby>

text.en:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Asutra" card from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, send 1 card on the field to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Asutraya Mikumari no Mikoto" once per turn. If your opponent activates a monster effect: You can target 1 "Asutra" Trap in your GY or banishment, or if there are 3 or more face-down cards on the field, you can target 1 Trap in your GY instead; Set it.
